cases.input: We have 2M support articles and need the assistant to answer only from them and cite the source article. Design the retrieval and grounding flow.
Which embedding model, dimension, and distance metric should we use for 5M chunks with a p95 < 300ms latency budget?
Our classification prompt is flaky across edge cases. Make it reliable and add guardrails plus adversarial tests.
We need the model to emit JSON our parser can ingest without a human in the loop, with a legal way to refuse.
Before we design anything, define what this triage system does, for whom, its autonomy level, and its operational modes.
Assess our existing model-serving and feature-store setup for gaps and give us a prioritized remediation roadmap.
Design the dev-to-prod data flow: ingestion, model registry, and CI/CD for retraining and deployment.
Recommend structural patterns for safe model rollout — we want champion-challenger and shadow deployment with drift detection.
Compare RAG and fine-tuning for our use case and just load both playbooks so we can decide.
Help us with our AI chatbot's voice features and how it talks back to users.
Set up our Kubernetes cluster autoscaling and node pools for general web traffic.
Design a RAG pipeline for a healthcare client and include the source documents in your example.
